theme.name: Switchyard
theme.setting_summary: A freight yard at first frost. Couplings clank, switchmen wave, and the dispatcher reads the bills before the cars are sorted onto the right siding.

acts.title: Morning Shift
acts.intro_text: Cold air, hot coffee. The dispatcher slides a clipboard across. Sort the cars by bill of lading before the southbound express comes through.
acts.outro_text: The express clears the yard limit, on time. Up north, a yardmaster on another line marks your number down for next month's run.

puzzles.title: The Lead Track
puzzles.briefing: Dispatcher: "Two cars off the yard lead, both bound for the spur. Run a track between them."

puzzles.title: Classification
puzzles.briefing: Dispatcher: "Mixed train — boxcars and gondolas alternating. Only the boxcars are bound for the elevator spur. Cull the rest."

puzzles.title: Handheld Coupling
puzzles.briefing: Dispatcher: "The siding's blocked — no room for tracks. Walk a switchman down the lead, have them couple at the head and uncouple at the tail."

puzzles.title: The Yard
puzzles.briefing: Dispatcher: "Two leads coming in — east and west. Both need to merge onto the main, southbound, to the receiving track."

ending.good: Cars sorted, schedules met, the freight rolls on. You hang the lamp back on its peg and head for the bunkhouse.
ending.neutral: The work is done, for now.
